title: Executive Ball Point Pen Collection, Boxed & Sleeved (Warwick, Rose Gold)
features: LIFETIME MECHANICAL GUARANTEE: From start to finish we will always have your back.
BALL POINT: Smooth twist action retractable ball pen.
COLLECTION: Over 40 Designs to choose from, find the one that suits you best.
PERFECT GIFT: Boxed and Sleeved, ready to be gifted.
description: Product Description Lifetime Mechanical Promise. To ensure the quality of each pen meets your expectations, we take pride in offering a lifetime mechanical promise for every pen, a testament to its superior design and construction. Crafted from high quality materials with great attention to detail, each pen is built to last. We are confident in its durability that we stand behind it - should any mechanical issues arise; we will repair or replace the pen. Invest in excellence and be confident that your pen is backed. Bridgewater Pen Company Introducing the impressive collection of quality, affordable writing instruments by the Bridgewater Pen Company. Each pen is perfect for professionals, students or anyone who likes to have a reliable pen on hand. Every Bridgewater pen arrives presented in a high-quality box protected by a sleeve, making the perfect gift for anyone. Whether you prefer the smooth and precise writing of a roller ball or the classic reliability of a ballpoint, there is a pen for everyone with over 40 elegant designs to choose from, all which are designed to accept standard international refills. All pens are designed to accept standard international refills. Over 40 designs to choose from. Exclusive to the UK. Each pen arrives in a high quality gift box. Bridgewater Pens This black & chrome ball point pen is from the Chester range, a simple yet sophisticated pen designed for smooth and effortless writing.
